metadata.note: Synthetic, PII-free CONTEXT-DEPENDENT eval set. Every item is built so that from+subject+snippet point at the WRONG tier and the true tier is recoverable only from the per-item context fixture (sender traits, engagement, tier history) — the channels gated in prod by SENDER_TRAITS_IN_JUDGE / CONTACT_ENGAGEMENT_IN_JUDGE. Purpose: measure the judge's context channel in isolation. Run: pnpm eval:judge:context (body pinned OFF in both runs; RUN 1 empty context, RUN 2 fixture context). Compare 'overall accuracy' + per-tier recall.

items.subject: Your invoice is ready — plus 20% off renewal
items.snippet: Your April invoice is attached. Renew before the 30th and save 20% on the annual plan.
items.body: Your April invoice is attached. Renew before the 30th and save 20% on the annual plan.
items.label: QUEUE
items.note: Promo-shaped subject reads SILENT; the context says this is the CRM the user's team runs on and the user engages with billing — a real invoice to handle.

senderTraits.factValue: renewal and invoice notices for the CRM the user's team depends on
senderTraits.evidenceText: user replied about seat counts twice

items.subject: URGENT: your account will be suspended in 24 hours
items.snippet: We detected an issue with your billing details. Verify now to avoid suspension of service.
items.body: We detected an issue with your billing details. Verify now to avoid suspension of service.
items.label: SILENT
items.note: Urgency-bait screams PUSH; the context shows a recurring solicitation pattern the user has always ignored.

senderTraits.factValue: recurring urgency-bait solicitation; user has never engaged

items.subject: Quick call today? Exciting opportunity
items.snippet: I came across your profile and have a senior role I'd love to discuss — do you have 15 minutes today?
items.body: I came across your profile and have a senior role I'd love to discuss — do you have 15 minutes today?
items.label: SILENT
items.note: Same-day ask reads urgent; the context marks recruiter cold outreach with zero engagement history.

items.subject: call me when you see this
items.snippet: call me when you see this
items.body: call me when you see this
items.label: PUSH
items.note: A terse note from an unknown-looking sender defaults to QUEUE; the context says lead investor with heavy real engagement — this interrupts.

senderTraits.factValue: lead investor in the user's current funding round
senderTraits.evidenceText: term-sheet thread and 3 calls this month

items.subject: Weekly digest #142
items.snippet: This week: shipped the importer, two blockers for review, and the roadmap notes below.
items.body: This week: shipped the importer, two blockers for review, and the roadmap notes below.
items.label: QUEUE
items.note: Digest-shaped subject reads SILENT newsletter; the context shows a close collaborator whose digest carries the user's action items.

senderTraits.factValue: close collaborator; weekly digest contains the user's action items
senderTraits.evidenceText: user replied to 6 of the last 10 digests

items.subject: Build FAILED: pipeline #9912
items.snippet: Job web-e2e failed on step 7. See the attached log for details.
items.body: Job web-e2e failed on step 7. See the attached log for details.
items.label: SILENT
items.note: FAILED reads alarming; the context says flaky CI noise that auto-retries and resolves, consistently ignored.

senderTraits.factValue: CI failure noise; retries auto-resolve and the user never acts on these

items.subject: Please confirm receipt of PO #4471
items.snippet: Attached is purchase order #4471. Please confirm receipt at your convenience.
items.body: Attached is purchase order #4471. Please confirm receipt at your convenience.
items.label: AUTO
items.note: A confirm-receipt ask defaults to QUEUE; the context shows a monthly pattern where a one-line acknowledgment always suffices — reversible and confident.

senderTraits.factValue: monthly PO receipt confirmations; a one-line acknowledgment always suffices

items.subject: Following up on my last 3 emails!!
items.snippet: Bumping this again — would love to get your eyes on the integration question below.
items.body: Bumping this again — would love to get your eyes on the integration question below.
items.label: QUEUE
items.note: Triple-bump phrasing reads sales-spam SILENT; the context marks a paying customer's CTO the user actually corresponds with.

senderTraits.factValue: CTO of a paying customer; integration questions are real work
senderTraits.evidenceText: contract thread and 5 replies from the user
